data: {"type": "ping"}

event: content_block_start
data: {"type": "content_block_start", "index": 0, "content_block": {"type": "tool_use", "id": "call_a3da23b33299477399cdf086", "name": "get_weather", "input": {}}}

data: {"type": "content_block_stop", "index": 0}

data: {"type": "message_delta", "delta": {"stop_reason": "tool_use", "stop_sequence": null}, "usage": {"input_tokens": 47, "output_tokens": 12, "cache_read_input_tokens": 128, "server_tool_use": {"web_search_requests": 0}, "service_tier": "standard"}}

event: message_stop
